fixtures._comment: default-catchall: weather in Tokyo — follow-up content after get_weather tool ran. The built-in default renderer renders the tool card; this fixture provides the narration follow-up. MUST come before tool-emitting fixture (first-match-wins).
default-catchall: weather in Tokyo — emit get_weather tool call. The CopilotKit built-in default renderer will catch this tool call since no user-supplied per-tool renderer is registered.
